title: Fresh Norwegian Doraji Bake
description: A simple and flavorful dish that highlights the unique taste and texture of bellflower root doraji. Perfect as a solo dinner or a side dish.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add sliced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add sliced onion to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes until softened.
In a separate bowl, mix together grated cheddar cheese, heavy cream, eggs, salt, and black pepper.

Arrange a layer of sliced doraji at the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish, followed by a layer of the onion mixture, and then a layer of the cheese mixture. Repeat this process until all ingredients have been used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Dot the top of the dish with remaining butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes until the top is golden brown and the doraji is tender.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and parmesan cheese before serving.
